smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few thundery showers later. Force 4 to 5 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 5 to 6 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
